## The anti-pattern

<!-- name it. one line. -->

## Why someone does this

<!-- the honest, charitable reason. not "they were stupid." -->

## Why it is terrible

<!-- concrete consequences. not "it's bad style." -->

## Have you seen this in a real codebase?

- [ ] Yes, in production
- [ ] Yes, in open source
- [ ] Yes, in a tutorial I was following
- [ ] Yes, I wrote it myself (respect for the honesty)
- [ ] No, but I am confident someone has


## Are you willing to implement it?

- [ ] Yes, I will open a PR
- [ ] No, I am just the idea person
- [ ] Maybe, depending on how busy I am (read: no)
